race.comment: FLYING BRANT (7) was denied narrowly on debut here 10 days ago when missing by a head to a fitter horse. Is sure to have come on from that and will prove much tougher to stop this time. DISCREETLY BLUE (1) was good when resuming at Gawler on Jan 3 but was left flat-footed second-up. Draws well and keeps Holder for this third-up assignment. Don't underestimate. MAHALER (13) has gotten too far back in her first two starts. She'll be hoping the tempo is genuine, so she can round them up. Don't underestimate. YARRAWIZARDHARRY (10) has only managed midfield finishes but strips fitter third-up and should be handy from the draw. Can play a major role this time.
